ApplyDiskBackup.document: This example shows you how to roll back a backup point to the original cloud disk.
ApplyDiskBackup.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ApplyDiskBackup
<Common request parameters>

{
    "DiskId": "disk-xxxxxxxx",
    "DiskBackupId": "dbp-xxxxxxxx"
}
ApplyDiskBackup.title: Rolling back a backup point to the original cloud disk

ApplySnapshot.document: This example shows you how to roll back a cloud disk to the specified snapshot point in time.
ApplySnapshot.title: Rolling back a snapshot

ApplySnapshotGroup.document: This example shows you how to roll back the specified snapshot group: csnap-gv9naz6b.
ApplySnapshotGroup.title: Rollback Snapshot Group

AttachDisks.document: This example shows you how to attach cloud disk disk-lzrg2pwi to the CVM ins-dyzmimrw.
AttachDisks.title: Attaching cloud disks

BindAutoSnapshotPolicy.document: This example shows you how to bind a scheduled snapshot policy to a single cloud disk.
BindAutoSnapshotPolicy.title: Binding a scheduled snapshot policy to a single cloud disk

CopySnapshotCrossRegions.document: This example shows you how to replicate a snapshot from Guangzhou to Beijing.
CopySnapshotCrossRegions.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CopySnapshotCrossRegions
<Common request parameters>

{
    "SnapshotId": "snap-ckgjwkqh",
    "DestinationRegions": [
        "ap-beijing"
    ]
}
CopySnapshotCrossRegions.title: Replicating a snapshot from Guangzhou to Beijing

CreateAutoSnapshotPolicy.document: This example shows you how to create a scheduled snapshot policy and bind it to cloud disks, which will create snapshots at 00:00 every Thursday.
CreateAutoSnapshotPolicy.title: Creates a scheduled snapshot policy

CreateDiskBackup.document: This example shows you how to manually create a backup point for a cloud disk with a backup point quota.
CreateDiskBackup.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateDiskBackup
<Common request parameters>

{
    "DiskId": "disk-xxxxxxxx"
}
CreateDiskBackup.title: Creating a backup point for a cloud disk

CreateDisks.document: This example shows you how to purchase a cloud disk with the following configuration: location is Guangzhou Zone 3, cloud disk size is 50GiB, type of cloud disk is ordinary cloud disk, project ID is 0, payment mode is prepaid, purchase duration is 1 month, notify and auto-renew on expiration.
CreateDisks.title: Purchasing with Basic Parameters

CreateDisks.document: This example shows you how to create a cloud disk by importing a snapshot without specifying the DiskSize parameter. At this point, the newly purchased cloud disk size equals the snapshot size, and the cloud disk copies the snapshot data.
CreateDisks.title: Creating a Cloud Disk Based on Snapshot

CreateDisks.document: This example shows you how to create a cloud disk in Guangzhou Zone 3 with the following configuration: high-performance cloud block storage, 100GiB size, and hourly postpaid payment type.
CreateDisks.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateDisks
<Common request parameters>

{
    "DiskName": "postPayDisk",
    "Placement": {
        "ProjectId": 0,
        "Zone": "ap-guangzhou-3"
    },
    "DiskChargeType": "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR",
    "DiskCount": 1,
    "DiskType": "CLOUD_PREMIUM",
    "DiskSize": 100
}
CreateDisks.title: Creating an Hourly Postpaid Cloud Disk

CreateSnapshot.document: This example shows you how to create a snapshot.
CreateSnapshot.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: CreateSnapshot
<Common request parameters>

{
    "SnapshotName": "snap_201711301015",
    "Deadline": "2022-01-08T09:47:55+00:00",
    "DiskId": "disk-lzrg2pwi"
}
CreateSnapshot.title: Creating a snapshot

CreateSnapshotGroup.document: This example shows you how to create a snapshot group.
CreateSnapshotGroup.title: Creating a Snapshot Group

DeleteAutoSnapshotPolicies.document: This example shows you how to delete scheduled snapshot policies: asp-mrsrn243 and asp-3lpl7ev3.
DeleteAutoSnapshotPolicies.title: Batch deleting scheduled snapshot policies

DeleteDiskBackups.document: This example shows you how to delete the cloud disk backup point with backup point ID dbp-xxxxxxxx.
DeleteDiskBackups.title: Deleting the backup points of a cloud disk

DeleteSnapshotGroup.document: This example shows you how to delete a snapshot group and the bound mirror at the same time.
DeleteSnapshotGroup.title: Deleting a Snapshot Group

DeleteSnapshots.document: This example shows you how to delete a specified snapshot.
DeleteSnapshots.title: Deleting snapshot

DescribeAutoSnapshotPolicies.document: This example shows you how to query scheduled snapshot policies in the `NORMAL` status
DescribeAutoSnapshotPolicies.title: Querying scheduled snapshot policies in the `NORMAL` status

DescribeDiskAssociatedAutoSnapshotPolicy.document: This example shows you how to query the regular snapshot policy bound to a cloud disk by its ID.
DescribeDiskAssociatedAutoSnapshotPolicy.title: Querying the Regular Snapshot Policy Bound to Cloud disk disk-dw0bbzws

DescribeDiskBackups.document: This example shows you how to query the backup point list.
DescribeDiskBackups.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeDiskBackups
<Common request parameters>

{
    "Limit": 10,
    "Offset": 0
}
DescribeDiskBackups.title: Querying the Backup Point List

DescribeDiskConfigQuota.document: This example shows you how to query the available specifications of high-performance cloud block storage in Shanghai Zone 5.
DescribeDiskConfigQuota.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: DescribeDiskConfigQuota
<Common request parameters>

{
    "InquiryType": "INQUIRY_CBS_CONFIG",
    "DiskChargeType": "POSTPAID_BY_HOUR",
    "Zones": [
        "ap-shanghai-5"
    ],
    "DiskTypes": [
        "CLOUD_PREMIUM"
    ]
}
DescribeDiskConfigQuota.title: Querying Available Specifications of High-Performance Cloud Block Storage in Shanghai Zone 5

ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.document: This example shows you how to enable an automatic snapshot policy
ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute
<Common request parameters>

{
    "AutoSnapshotPolicyId": "asp-01928374",
    "IsActivated": true
}
ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.title: Enabling an Automatic Snapshot Policy

ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.document: This example shows you how to modify the scheduled snapshot policy named data_disk_auto_snapshot and set IsPermanent to true, so that snapshots created by the regular snapshot policy are retained permanently.
ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.input:
POST / HTTP/1.1
Host: cbs.tencentcloudapi.com
Content-Type: application/json
X-TC-Action: ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute
<Common request parameters>

{
    "AutoSnapshotPolicyId": "asp-nqu08k2l",
    "AutoSnapshotPolicyName": "data_disk_auto_snapshot",
    "IsPermanent": true
}
ModifyAutoSnapshotPolicyAttribute.title: Changing Scheduled Snapshot Policy Attributes
